prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SOLAR-CAMPSHOWER-5GAL-RL-NCX Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Compact Lightweight Camping Solar Heated Travel Shower Bag for Hiking and Boating With Temperature Chart, 5 Gallon Water Capacity Description: If your plans include a remote trekking, backpacking, camping, hiking trip, or even a summer ocean boating adventure, pack the lightweight and compact ASR Outdoor 5 Gallon Solar Shower wherever you're able to harness the power of the sun.

The portable travel shower uses solar technology to warm water for a refreshing shower while you adventure in the wilderness. Taking approximately three hours to absorb heat, or once the sun has warmed the water to your desired temperature, simply open the on/off spigot and get ready to rinse.

Take a shower, rinse clothes, dishes, equipment, pets, sandy feet or even an open wound, or any other tasks that require water flow when camping, backpacking, boating, hiking, trekking and more.
As mentioned, the solar shower can hold up to 5 gallons (or 20 liters) of water, enough for multiple showers when you're out in the wilderness. With a temperature gauge (Celsius and Fahrenheit) and water level window, easily manage the temperature and volume with these built-in features; no guesswork needed.

Folding up into a small package, packing this travel-friendly, portable camping solar shower into your camping gear or backpack will be a breeze; lightweight, compact and reliable, a fresh rinse is always just a few hours away. (Hanging tools included)

For Best Results: lay bag in direct sunlight when sun is at highest point
Set up and Operation:
1. Insert the PVC Pipe into the handle's slot
2. Secure the bag upright by tethering the rope & hook to the handle and suitable anchor
3. For water to flow, allow the hose to hang without kinks and rotate the spigot to the ON position Search Terms: camping accessories gear shower supplies gadgets trekking backpacking ultralight hiking backpack compact lightweight portable travel boating black bag first aid kits 5 gallon hot bladder pack earthquake emergency tool disaster tools prepper Features: - PERFECT FOR CAMPING: The lightweight ASR Outdoor 5 Gallon Solar Shower for a refreshing rinse, wherever you can harness the power of the sun (takes approx. 3 hours for full heat absorption) - SOLAR POWERED SHOWER: Once the sun naturally heats the water to a desired temperature, open the on/off spigot and you're ready to go - LARGE WATER CAPACITY: Hold up to 5 gallons of water, enough for multiple showers when you're out in the wilderness; built in temperature gauge and water level window, easily manage the temperature and volume with these built-in features - PORTABLE & EASY TO PACK: Folding up into a small package, packing this portable camping solar shower into your camping gear or backpack will be a breeze; lightweight, compact and reliable - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 25 x 16 inches; Hose Dimensions: 23 inches with shower head; Material: PVC; Color: Black; Water Temperature can reach up to 122 degrees Fahrenheit === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5 Gallon Black Solar Shower Bag

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5-Gal Black Solar Shower Bag

anthropic.title_differentiation: Solar Powered, Portable Camping Shower, Temperature Gauge, Water Level Window, Includes Hose And Shower Head

openai.title_differentiation: 5 Gallon Capacity, Solar Heated Water, Temperature Gauge, Water Level Window, Portable Foldable Design
